content:
🌟 mesh-market | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: Synchronizing files and folders directly between personal devices without relying on cloud storage or a central server.
✨ Key Features: • Direct device-to-device folder syncing • Decentralized peer discovery (mDNS, BitTorrent DHT) • Secure data transfer (WebRTC, XChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption) • Conflict detection and resolution • Background operation
📖 Summary: Mesh Market is a decentralized file synchronization tool that allows users to sync folders directly between their own devices without a central server. It uses various peer-to-peer technologies for discovery and secure data transfer, ensuring end-to-end encryption.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
